_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Aims Max Gardenia Golf City
project.address: GH-02, Eco City, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.description: Aims Max Gardenia Golf City is a massive ready-to-move 80-acre thematic township in Sector 75, Noida, featuring rich sports amenities and close metro connectivity.
project.long_description: Aims Max Gardenia Golf City is a landmark ready-to-move-in residential township spread over a sprawling 80 acres in Central Noida, Sector 75. Developed by Aims Max Gardenia Developers Pvt. Ltd., the project houses over 900 apartments across 25 magnificent towers. Designed with a distinct 'golf-centric' lifestyle, nearly 80% of the project's layout is dedicated to beautifully manicured green expanses, water bodies, and outdoor activity courts. Residents enjoy premium facilities including an Olympic-length adult swimming pool, a separate toddler pool with slides, a grand central clubhouse with a restaurant, and a highly active sports complex featuring lawn tennis and basketball zones. The project's location is a massive highlight, sitting just 500 meters from the Sector 50 Aqua Line Metro Station and directly across the newly opened Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital. However, buyers should note that registries are currently frozen due to ₹1,717 Crore in legacy land dues owed by the builder SPC to the Noida Authority.
project.project_risk_flag: Severe: Noida Authority outstanding dues of ₹1,717 Crore. Attachment orders issued.
registry_embargo_reasons: Colossal builder land lease dues of ₹1,717 Crore, no CC/OC received.

builder.name: Aims Max Gardenia Developers Pvt. Ltd.
builder.company_overview: Aims Max Gardenia Developers Pvt. Ltd. is a real estate special purpose vehicle formed as a consortium between Aims Promoters, Gardenia India, Maxblis Construction, and other NCR builders to develop the Eco City layout in Sector 75. While the group has delivered a substantial volume of units, it faces extreme distress with massive outstanding liabilities, credit defaults, and frozen registrations.
builder.parent_group: Aims Max Gardenia Developers Pvt. Ltd. Group

connectivity.notes: Directly accessible across Sector 50/75 main road

assumptions: Ready-to-move secondary market resale purchase. 0% GST applies.

payment_plan.notes: Transfers require AOA clearance due to builder dues.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Aims Max Gardenia Golf City offers massive, golf-themed acreage at a steep discount compared to Sector 75 market norms, but comes with critical legal baggage of locked registries.
why_buy: High-Acreage Greenery: Spread over 80 acres with lush, golf-centric landscaped gardens and parks.
Metro Proximity: Less than 500m walk to the Sector 50 Aqua Line Metro Station.
Extremely Affordable Entry: Resale price per sqft is nearly half of neighboring premium projects.
Immediately Occupied: Fully ready and buzzing with over 900 residential units.
why_avoid: Colossal Builder Dues: Developer SPC owes over ₹1,717 Crore in outstanding land lease dues to Noida Authority.
Frozen Registries: Homebuyers have been waiting for formal property registrations for up to a decade.
Maintenance Gaps: Common spaces, lifts, and fire fighting systems suffer from developer fund diversion.
decision_profile.best_for: Budget-conscious families seeking large ready-to-move green townships, who do not require immediate registration.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Conservative home buyers requiring clear legal titles, corporate bank mortgage seekers, or short-term speculative investors.

buyerPersonas.headline: Immediate Space Over Legal Speed
reasons: Spacious layouts with direct metro access at very low resale prices.
Active community with operating gardens and children sports areas.

riskRadar.description: Noida Authority has issued asset attachment orders of ₹2,409 Crore. Registry completely frozen.
Common facilities and Sewage Treatment Plant (STP) have faced non-compliance regulatory penalties.
Resale exit is slow as buyers cannot avail traditional home mortgages on unregistered flats.

transparency_checks.label: OC / CC Received
transparency_checks.details: Noida Authority withheld Completion Certificate due to ₹1,717 Cr developer land dues.

transparency_checks.label: Registry Active
transparency_checks.details: Registries are completely frozen as of mid-2026.

transparency_checks.label: Escrow Account
transparency_checks.details: No active builder escrow; developer is in severe financial distress.

transparency_checks.label: NCLT Moratorium
transparency_checks.details: Consortium member Gardenia India is in NCLT; SPC itself has faced recovery attachments.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Capital value growth is deeply constrained until the developer settles the land dues with Noida Authority.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Excellent rental demand. 3 BHK rentals range between ₹28,000 to ₹40,000/month due to metro proximity.
investment_insights.market_desc: Active rental hub with a large volume of cash-based resale discount enquiries.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Exits are slow and cash-based as banks decline to finance unregistered resale units.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Highly Integrated Corridor
neighborhood_advantages.description: Lies on the primary central high street of Sector 75, Noida.

persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Families moving from cramped rentals or cheaper areas who have liquid cash, wanting high square footage and direct metro access.
persona_descriptions.INVESTOR: Investors looking for strong monthly cash-flow and rental yield. Metro proximity guarantees high occupancy rates and steady rent.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate-High (willing to live without registration in exchange for deep discounts)
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to secure immediately occupable homes with green parks and metro proximity, accepting the title deadlock.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Only buy if you are a cash-rich end-user prioritizing massive, green, immediate living spaces and metro convenience. Avoid if you require bank mortgages.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Excellent day-to-day comfort with highly integrated parks, kids play zones, and Spectrum mall at your doorstep. Ensure your specific tower has functioning elevators.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Yield play only. Resale acquisition costs are heavily suppressed, yielding high rental returns.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: A safe gated community with plenty of kids playing in active sports complexes.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Low entry pricing means strong yields but do not count on fast capital appreciation.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: While conceptually a golf township with premium specs, finishes have suffered due to developer legal distress.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: High legal/title risk. You are buying a flat without active registry. Verify all records.
walk_away_conditions: Inability to execute a foolproof builder transfer/AOA tripartite resale ledger.
Towers suffering from structural dampness, leakage, or major lift malfunctions.
negotiation_leverage: Use the massive ₹1,717 Cr Noida Authority attachment threat and frozen registries as intense leverage to squeeze down the resale price.
Benchmark against Panchsheel Pratishtha which is fully compliant.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Do not rush. Look for registered units at high discounts.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Extremely larger township green area (80 acres vs 5 acres); much lower price point (₹7,380/sqft vs ₹13,500/sqft).
competitors.competitor_advantage: Fully clean legal title; active registrations; zero land dues embargo; Mivan construction quality.
competitors.verdict: Choose Panchsheel Pratishtha for absolute title peace of mind; choose Gardenia Golf City ONLY if budget is limited.
competitors.price_delta_note: Gardenia Golf City is almost ₹6,000 per sqft cheaper.
